warp.name: JoAi: Record Store Entry

description.en: Record a new data point in a tracked store (e.g. log weight, add expense, track habit).
description.de: Erfasse einen neuen Datenpunkt in einem Datenspeicher (z.B. Gewicht, Ausgabe, Gewohnheit).
description.es: Record a new data point in a tracked store (e.g. log weight, add expense, track habit).
description.fr: Record a new data point in a tracked store (e.g. log weight, add expense, track habit).
description.ro: Record a new data point in a tracked store (e.g. log weight, add expense, track habit).
description.it: Record a new data point in a tracked store (e.g. log weight, add expense, track habit).

warp.bot: Use this when the user reports a new measurement or data point for something they're tracking — a weight reading, an expense amount, a habit completion, etc.

inputs.name: Store Name

description.en: The name of the store to record to
description.de: Name des Speichers
description.es: The name of the store to record to
description.fr: The name of the store to record to
description.ro: The name of the store to record to
description.it: The name of the store to record to

inputs.bot: The exact name of the existing store to append to.

inputs.name: Value

description.en: The value to record
description.de: Der zu erfassende Wert
description.es: The value to record
description.fr: The value to record
description.ro: The value to record
description.it: The value to record

inputs.bot: The data point value — a number, string, or boolean.

inputs.name: Label

description.en: Optional label for this entry (e.g. "morning weigh-in")
description.de: Optionales Label (z.B. "Morgens")
description.es: Optional label for this entry (e.g. "morning weigh-in")
description.fr: Optional label for this entry (e.g. "morning weigh-in")
description.ro: Optional label for this entry (e.g. "morning weigh-in")
description.it: Optional label for this entry (e.g. "morning weigh-in")

inputs.bot: Optional label to describe this specific entry.

description.en: Get the current scalar value from a named store. Returns the most recent entry's value for status pages, counters, and configuration.
description.de: Den aktuellen skalaren Wert aus einem benannten Store abrufen. Gibt den Wert des letzten Eintrags für Statusseiten, Zähler und Konfiguration zurück.
description.es: Obtén el valor escalar actual de un store con nombre. Devuelve el valor de la entrada más reciente para páginas de estado, contadores y configuración.
description.fr: Obtenir la valeur scalaire actuelle d'un store nommé. Renvoie la valeur de l'entrée la plus récente pour les pages de statut, les compteurs et la configuration.
description.ro: Obține valoarea scalară curentă dintr-un store denumit. Returnează valoarea celei mai recente intrări pentru pagini de stare, contoare și configurare.
description.it: Ottieni il valore scalare corrente da uno store nominato. Restituisce il valore dell'ultimo inserimento per pagine di stato, contatori e configurazione.

warp.name: JoAi: Query Store Data

description.en: Query and view entries from a tracked data store with optional date filters.
description.de: Einträge eines Datenspeichers abfragen und mit optionalen Datumsfiltern anzeigen.

description.fr: Query and view entries from a tracked data store with optional date filters.
description.ro: Query and view entries from a tracked data store with optional date filters.
description.it: Query and view entries from a tracked data store with optional date filters.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants to see their tracked data, check progress, view history, or look up past entries in a store.

inputs.name: Store Name

description.en: The name of the store to query
description.de: Name des abzufragenden Speichers
description.es: The name of the store to query
description.fr: The name of the store to query
description.ro: The name of the store to query
description.it: The name of the store to query

inputs.bot: The exact name of the store to query.

inputs.name: Since

description.en: Show entries after this date.
description.de: Einträge nach diesem Datum anzeigen.
description.es: Show entries after this date.
description.fr: Show entries after this date.
description.ro: Show entries after this date.
description.it: Show entries after this date.

inputs.bot: Optional start date filter. Convert to ISO 8601 format before submitting.

inputs.name: Until

description.en: Show entries before this date.
description.de: Einträge vor diesem Datum anzeigen.
description.es: Show entries before this date.
description.fr: Show entries before this date.
description.ro: Show entries before this date.
description.it: Show entries before this date.

inputs.bot: Optional end date filter. Convert to ISO 8601 format before submitting.

inputs.name: Last N

description.en: Return only the last N entries
description.de: Nur die letzten N Einträge zurückgeben
description.es: Return only the last N entries
description.fr: Return only the last N entries
description.ro: Return only the last N entries
description.it: Return only the last N entries

inputs.bot: Optional number to return only the most recent N entries.

description.en: Set a value in a named store. Stores are simple key-value databases for status pages, counters, or configuration data. Each set overwrites the previous value.
description.de: Einen Wert in einem benannten Store setzen. Stores sind einfache Key-Value-Datenbanken für Statusseiten, Zähler oder Konfigurationsdaten. Jedes Setzen überschreibt den vorherigen Wert.
description.es: Set a value in a named store. Stores are simple key-value databases for status pages, counters, or configuration data. Each set overwrites the previous value.
description.fr: Set a value in a named store. Stores are simple key-value databases for status pages, counters, or configuration data. Each set overwrites the previous value.
description.ro: Set a value in a named store. Stores are simple key-value databases for status pages, counters, or configuration data. Each set overwrites the previous value.
description.it: Set a value in a named store. Stores are simple key-value databases for status pages, counters, or configuration data. Each set overwrites the previous value.

description.en: JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.

description.es: JoAi es una plataforma para crear y gestionar tus propios agentes de IA.

warp.name: JoAi: Store Set

description.en: Set a value in a named store. Stores are simple key-value databases for status pages, counters, or configuration data. Each set overwrites the previous value.
description.de: Einen Wert in einem benannten Store setzen. Stores sind einfache Key-Value-Datenbanken für Statusseiten, Zähler oder Konfigurationsdaten. Jedes Setzen überschreibt den vorherigen Wert.
description.es: Set a value in a named store. Stores are simple key-value databases for status pages, counters, or configuration data. Each set overwrites the previous value.
description.fr: Set a value in a named store. Stores are simple key-value databases for status pages, counters, or configuration data. Each set overwrites the previous value.
description.ro: Set a value in a named store. Stores are simple key-value databases for status pages, counters, or configuration data. Each set overwrites the previous value.
description.it: Set a value in a named store. Stores are simple key-value databases for status pages, counters, or configuration data. Each set overwrites the previous value.

warp.bot: Used by other warps to set a value in a named store. Overwrites the previous value. Not meant to be invoked directly.

description.en: Name of the store
description.de: Name des Stores

description.en: Value to set
description.de: Zu setzender Wert

description.en: Optional label or note
description.de: Optionaler Label oder Notiz
description.es: Optional label or note
description.fr: Optional label or note
description.ro: Optional label or note
description.it: Optional label or note

description.en: Toggle a scalar store value between two states. Reads the current value, flips it (open↔closed, on↔off, etc.), and saves the new state. Returns both the previous and new value.
description.de: Einen skalaren Store-Wert zwischen zwei Zuständen umschalten. Liest den aktuellen Wert, kippt ihn (offen↔geschlossen, an↔aus, etc.) und speichert den neuen Zustand. Gibt sowohl den vorherigen als auch den neuen Wert zurück.
description.es: Alterna un valor escalar del store entre dos estados. Lee el valor actual, lo invierte (abierto↔cerrado, encendido↔apagado, etc.) y guarda el nuevo estado. Devuelve tanto el valor anterior como el nuevo.
description.fr: Bascule une valeur scalaire de store entre deux états. Lit la valeur actuelle, l'inverse (ouvert↔fermé, allumé↔éteint, etc.) et enregistre le nouvel état. Retourne à la fois la valeur précédente et la nouvelle.
description.ro: Comută o valoare scalară a unui store între două stări. Citește valoarea curentă, o inversează (deschis↔închis, pornit↔oprit, etc.) și salvează noua stare. Returnează atât valoarea anterioară cât și cea nouă.
description.it: Alterna un valore scalare dello store tra due stati. Legge il valore corrente, lo inverte (aperto↔chiuso, acceso↔spento, ecc.) e salva il nuovo stato. Restituisce sia il valore precedente che quello nuovo.

description.es: JoAi es una plataforma para crear y gestionar tus propios agentes de IA.
description.ro: JoAi este o platforma pentru crearea si gestionarea propriilor tai agenti AI.

warp.name: JoAi: Store Toggle

description.en: Toggle a scalar store value between two states. Reads the current value, flips it (open↔closed, on↔off, etc.), and saves the new state. Returns both the previous and new value.
description.de: Einen skalaren Store-Wert zwischen zwei Zuständen umschalten. Liest den aktuellen Wert, kippt ihn (offen↔geschlossen, an↔aus, etc.) und speichert den neuen Zustand. Gibt sowohl den vorherigen als auch den neuen Wert zurück.
description.es: Alterna un valor escalar del store entre dos estados. Lee el valor actual, lo invierte (abierto↔cerrado, encendido↔apagado, etc.) y guarda el nuevo estado. Devuelve tanto el valor anterior como el nuevo.
description.fr: Bascule une valeur scalaire de store entre deux états. Lit la valeur actuelle, l'inverse (ouvert↔fermé, allumé↔éteint, etc.) et enregistre le nouvel état. Retourne à la fois la valeur précédente et la nouvelle.
description.ro: Comută o valoare scalară a unui store între două stări. Citește valoarea curentă, o inversează (deschis↔închis, pornit↔oprit, etc.) și salvează noua stare. Returnează atât valoarea anterioară cât și cea nouă.
description.it: Alterna un valore scalare dello store tra due stati. Legge il valore corrente, lo inverte (aperto↔chiuso, acceso↔spento, ecc.) e salva il nuovo stato. Restituisce sia il valore precedente che quello nuovo.

warp.bot: Used by other warps to toggle a scalar store value. Reads current state, flips it, and saves the result. Not meant to be invoked directly.

description.en: Name of the store to toggle
description.de: Name des umzuschaltenden Stores
description.es: Nombre del store a alternar
description.fr: Nom du store à basculer
description.ro: Numele store-ului de comutat
description.it: Nome dello store da alternare
